## What feature are you requesting?

A clear description of the feature or enhancement.

## Why is this needed?

What problem does this solve? How does it improve Marlin?

## Which skills are affected?

List any existing skills that would need to change:

- 

## Proposed approach

If you have an idea for how to implement this, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to achieve the same goal? Why is this approach better?

## Additional context

Any other information, mockups, or references.
